name: Coach Gun
description: The Coach Gun is a Jakobs double-barrel shotgun that fires a heavy spread of pellets per shot, costing 2 shells each time you pull the trigger. Most variants have a very small magazine, so it plays best at close range with constant reloads. It suits builds that gain value from frequent empty-mag reload effects.
notes: A rare common-quality version can spawn with a 1-round magazine, yet still spends 2 shells by taking the second from reserves. With Smaller, Lighter, Faster this can reduce the usable magazine to 0 and cause odd behaviour, but it can also be used to trigger instant empty-mag synergies such as Money Shot-type effects. Available as a regular world drop.
